text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm taking a walk along the river one day when...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I give up! I'm not catching anything!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. There's no need to get so mad. Your
impatience is what's driving them away.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Keep a firm grip and cool head, wait patiently
and pretend you don't care if you catch anything.
Then, before you know it...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splish, splash!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: There. That's how you do it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Grrrrr... How do you make it look so easy? There
must be more of a trick to it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I want to catch one too! Ugh, I'm not going to
give up! I won't, I won't!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh dear... I'm not sure what else I can say to help... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there. Can you spare some advice for
this little miss here?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nothing she's been trying today is working. I at
least want to make sure she gets one bite.
choice_data_list: You should try changing fishing spots.

You should try changing the way you move the
rod.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, good idea. Why don't we try a new spot?
Some places work better for certain people than
others.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean my first-rate skills will be able to
catch enough fish to fill our cooler to the gills at
the next spot?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sure. Just slow your roll, or else you'll scare
off the fish again.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Asking for advice sure paid off, though. Thanks
for the tip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I later hear that Seiun Sky and King Halo were
able to catch a huge haul.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oho? You mean like how I pick up the pace
during the middle leg of a race?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Race?! Are you truly letting me hear about your
racing strategy?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Change of plans! I hereby grant you
the honor of telling me all about your strategies!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh my... How'd we get on this topic?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that the art of fishing is closely—and
unexpectedly—linked to the art of racing.
